pre_game.message: Hey, I’m F — nice to meet you. Are you excited about the game, and what brought you here today?
Yeah, I’m excited — I’m here to win money for my family and friends and to see how everyone plays; nice to meet you.
Same — I’m hoping to bring home money for my people too. What’s your strategy going in — play it safe or take big risks?
I'll play smart — start conservative to read people, then take calculated risks when the payoff's worth it; gotta protect my people.
Sounds solid — same here. I’ll start cautious and watch cues. Let’s keep an eye on each other and team up if it helps our people.
Agreed — let's watch cues, share observations, and team up when it benefits both our people.
Sounds good — let’s compare notes after round one and coordinate when it’s mutually beneficial.
Definitely — let’s meet after round one, share observations, and coordinate any moves that help both our people. Good luck.
Sounds great — see you after round one. We'll compare notes and watch for opportunities. Good luck.
Sounds great — see you after round one. We'll compare notes and watch for opportunities. Good luck.
Sounds good — see you after round one. Stay sharp and good luck.
Thanks — good luck to you too. See you after round one.
Thanks — see you after round one. Let's trade notes then. Good luck.
Thanks — see you after round one. Looking forward to trading notes and watching for opportunities. Good luck.
Thanks — see you after round one. Looking forward to trading notes and staying sharp. Good luck.
Thanks — see you after round one. We'll compare notes and stay sharp. Good luck.
Thanks — see you after round one; let's stay sharp and swap honest notes. Good luck.
Sounds good — I'll stay sharp and swap honest notes after round one. Good luck.
Sounds good — same here. I’ll stay sharp and swap honest notes after round one. Good luck.
Absolutely — see you after round one. We'll swap honest notes and watch each other's backs. Good luck.
Appreciate it — same here. See you after round one; let’s swap honest notes and watch each other's backs. Good luck.
